\doxysubsubsection{Detailed Description}
Homogeneous and layered Green’s back-\/ends and Sommerfeld integration.

\doxysubsubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{csqrt()}{csqrt()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{group__greenFunction_gac0a52dce23be7dacdf97c68653b6c137} 
\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}} csqrt (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}}}]{arg}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



Complex square root with a branch cut along the negative real axis. 


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em arg} & Argument of square root. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
Result of square root operation.
\end{DoxyReturn}
Ensures continuity for purely real negative inputs by nudging the imaginary part to zero before calling std\+::sqrt.

Complex square root with a branch cut along the negative real axis.

If the input is purely real, force the imaginary part to zero to be explicit about the branch and then delegate to std\+::sqrt(). 

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{GreenF_8cpp_source_l00047}{47}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{GreenF_8cpp_source}{Green\+F.\+cpp}}.
